where_to_eat.name: Tegukopi
where_to_eat.description: A cafe located in Kintamani with excellent views. Known for being a favorite spot with great photo opportunities.

into_the_wild.name: Jerman Beach
into_the_wild.description: A scenic beach in Bali known for fantastic sunset and sun-aligned photography opportunities.

into_the_wild.name: Kintamani
into_the_wild.description: A mountainous area in Bali known for its volcano views and natural landscape, described as the best area in Bali by visitors.

into_the_wild.name: Ubud Rice Fields
into_the_wild.description: Central Bali area famous for its iconic rice terraces and waterfalls, a highlight of the island's natural attractions.

into_the_wild.name: Bali Waterfalls
into_the_wild.description: Multiple scenic waterfall locations throughout Bali offering beautiful coastal lines and nature experiences.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Tegukopi Cafe, Kintamani
gram_worthy_spots.description: A Instagram-worthy cafe in Kintamani with stunning volcano views and excellent photo opportunities.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Jerman Beach
gram_worthy_spots.description: Picturesque beach location perfect for capturing sun-aligned shots and golden hour photography.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Ubud Rice Terraces
gram_worthy_spots.description: Iconic terraced rice fields in Ubud that are highly photogenic and represent classic Bali imagery.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Uluwatu Cliffs
gram_worthy_spots.description: Dramatic cliff formations offering spectacular viewpoint photography and scenic coastal vistas.
